company_context: AI Workflow Automation Platform & Tools - n8n Flexible AI workflow automation for technical teams. Build with the precision of code or the speed of drag-n-drop. Host with on-prem control or in-the-cloud convenience. n8n gives you more freedom to implement multi-step AI agents and integrate apps than any other tool. Get started for free Talk to sales The world's most popular workflow automation platform for technical teams including IT Ops can On-board new employees Sec Ops can Enrich security incident tickets Dev Ops can Convert natural language into API calls Sales can Generate customer insights from reviews You can Watch this video to hear our pitch Top 50 Github. Our 177.2k stars place us among the most popular projects. 4.9/5 stars on G2. To quote "A solid automation tool that just works." 200k+ community members. This wouldn't be possible without you. Plug AI into your own data & over 500 integrations Browse all integrations The fast way to actually get AI working in your business Build multi-step agents calling custom tools Create agentic systems on a single screen. Integrate any LLM into your workflows as fast as you can drag-n-drop. Explore AI Update Detected Running Custom Unit Testing Update Rolled Back Automatically IT Team Notified of New Ticket Custom Unit Testing Failed Update Installed Self-host everything – including AI models Protect your data by deploying on-prem. Deploy with Docker Access the entire source code on Github Hosted version also available Chat with your own data Use Slack, Teams, SMS, voice, or our embedded chat interface to get accurate answers from your data, create tasks, and complete workflows. Who held meetings with SpaceX last week? On Wednesday, Joe updated the status to "won" in Salesforce after a Zoom call. On Thursday, Sue provided on-site setup and closed the ServiceNow ticket. Create a task in Asana... Code when you need it, UI when you don't Other tools limit you to either a visual building experience, or code. With n8n, you get the best of both worlds. Write JavaScript or Python - you can always fall back to code Add libraries from npm or Python for even more power Paste cURL requests into your workflow Merge workflow branches , don’t just split them Run. Tweak. Repeat The same short feedback loops that make you smile at your scripts. Re-run single steps without re-running the whole workflow Replay or mock data to avoid waiting for external systems Debug fast , with logs in line with your code Use 1700+ templates to jump-start your project See full product overview See The Results Case Studies How Delivery Hero saved 200 hours each month with a single ITOps workflow “We’ve sped up our integration of marketplace data sources by 25X. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing with n8n, the AI workflow automation platform. I'd love to explore how our data processing solution can help you streamline your operations.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah, we're pretty happy with n8n so far. What makes you think we need another tool like DeepData AI? We've already got a pretty solid workflow automation setup.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's great to hear! However, our solution focuses specifically on data processing, which can be a bottleneck in many workflow automation platforms. We've seen companies like yours benefit from our ability to handle large volumes of data and provide real-time insights. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it can integrate with n8n.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's a priority for us right now. We're in the middle of a big project and our team is already stretched thin. Adding another tool to the mix might just add more complexity. Plus, I'm not sure what the ROI would be on this. Can you tell me more about the pricing?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. Our pricing is competitive, and we offer a tiered system based on the volume of data you're processing. We've had companies see significant cost savings by implementing our solution, especially when it comes to reducing manual data entry and minimizing errors.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but like I said, we're really busy right now. And to be honest, we've been looking at some other solutions that seem to offer similar functionality at a lower cost. Have you guys done any comparisons with, say, Zapier or Automate.io?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Yes, we have. While those tools are great for simple automations, they can become cumbersome when dealing with complex data processing tasks. Our solution is designed to handle those more intricate workflows and provide more advanced analytics. I'd be happy to provide a comparison sheet and show you how DeepData AI can address some of the limitations you might be experiencing with those tools.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I think we're going to have to pass on this for now. We just don't have the bandwidth to explore another tool, and our current priorities are elsewhere. Maybe check in with us in a few months and see if our needs have changed, but for now, I'm afraid the answer is no.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's concern about bandwidth and explored potential solutions to help the buyer prioritize the implementation of DeepData AI. Sentiment: Neutral
